tasks_completed.rationale: Files were tracked in git index; .gitignore patterns prevent re-introduction after cleanup

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — multiple historical commits; files landed in index before .gitignore patterns existed
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: .gitignore lacked patterns for .playwright-mcp/, happy-web-debug-*.png, bun.lock, package-lock.json at time of initial commits
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Patterns added to prevent re-introduction; tracked files removed from index; physical files deleted per spec

dev.qa_notes: Run in /root/happy: (1) git ls-files bun.lock package-lock.json happy-web-debug-1.png .playwright-mcp/ — expect empty output. (2) git check-ignore -v .playwright-mcp/ happy-web-debug-*.png bun.lock package-lock.json — expect all matched. (3) ls /root/happy/bun.lock /root/happy/package-lock.json /root/happy/happy-web-debug-1.png — expect 'No such file'. (4) ls /root/happy/.playwright-mcp/ — log file still on disk (intentional: --cached only).

self_verification.build: skipped (no build step — .gitignore config change only)
self_verification.notes: git ls-files returned empty for all targeted files. git check-ignore confirmed all 4 patterns active at .gitignore lines 57-60. Physical file absence confirmed via ls (exit 2 = no such file). .playwright-mcp/console log remains on disk as expected (--cached untrack only).

recommendations: DO NOT COMMIT yet — orchestrator manages commit timing across all repos
yarn.lock should be regenerated if absent (run yarn install in /root/happy) — the removal of bun.lock and package-lock.json leaves only yarn as the lockfile manager
